video_title: The Shows That Thrill The World | Netflix
reply_text:
@Leader_YangThat’s my point. almost no one knew who Jenna was before Wednesday came out. 

Jenna made the Wednesday character ALLURING. 

For example, I’m sure you know Jenna changed quite a few lines in the script? To the point she considered herself “unprofessional” on set? She disliked a lot of the lines, because she felt it didn’t fit with the character. She admitted she would at times, just change dialogue on the spot, and even have to sit down with the script supervisors to explain to them why she changed the line. 

You really think another actress would’ve done that throughout filming? 

Also, you know her little dance that went absolutely viral and became a crazy sensation? 

Director Tim Burton initially wanted a choreographer to work with whatever actress got the part, to come up with the dance. But Jenna herself told Tim to not hire a choreographer and she wanted to come up with the dance herself. 

In fact, the dance scene was supposed to be a FLASH MOB. She would start dancing, and then students around would join in and dance with her. Jenna is the one who said no to that, and wanted a solo dance. 

That famous dance was all Jenna and research she did. 

Had this been another actress, she definitely most likely doesn’t make the decisions Jenna ultimately made in regard to the character, and what we eventually got.
